summary: Edge is rule specialization + risk, not price-predicting ML. Primary=side, secondary=filter/size.
next_action: Keep this architecture for all new versions

summary: Per-symbol specialists beat one global filter set. High-beta wants block_red_flag; SPY wants VWAP and hates red-flag/vol_confirm.
next_action: Freeze routing; validate on longer OOS before more filter stacks

summary: Half-Kelly + ATR stop/trail improves DD path vs unrisked stacks (Sharpe~1.72, DD~-24% on short window).
next_action: Combine risk layer with meta-label size when ML works

summary: Naive XGB filter found no edge (any_edge=false). Used fixed 5-bar labels and synthetic candidates, not real engine entries/trade PnL.
next_action: Rebuild meta-XGB on real SignalEngine candidates + trade-outcome/triple-barrier labels; walk-forward only

summary: Promote only if OOS PF>1.2, |DD|<25%, Sharpe>0.5, enough trades. Win rate alone is vanity.
SSRN/AFML: meta-labeling (Joubert 4032018) + CPCV over naive WF for overfitting (4686376). LSE: walk-forward, shallow XGB, feature importance.
next_action: Use as checklist when designing v15+ ML layers

summary: Frozen v13 FAIL on 2020-2026 (1D fallback): PF 1.24 ok but DD -36% and Sharpe 0.45 miss bar; edge concentrated 2023-2024
next_action: Do not promote v13 as durable edge. Prefer risk layer (v14) + true meta-label on trade outcomes; re-research longer OOS with real 1H/tick data or liquid bucket; avoid more short-window specialist retunes

summary: Interim Phase B: walk-forward meta-XGB on real engine-exit labels reports edge=true (avg lift_exp ~0.007, filt hit ~60%); await full agent completion + portfolio backtest before promote
next_action: Wait for Phase B agent finish; then PASS_BAR check on portfolio results before WINNER update

summary: True meta-XGB on v13 engine-exit labels: modest OOS lift (+2.4pp hit, +0.74pp exp) across 2 half-year folds; shipped gated engine but NOT promoted to WINNER pending portfolio PF/Sharpe/DD vs v13
next_action: Run portfolio backtest runs/poc_va_v15 vs v13/v14; promote only if PASS_BAR clears. Do not stack more short-window specialist retunes after v13_long_oos FAIL.

summary: vol_z>=2 OOS WR lift but train WR does not lift (thin n); live GEX snapshots OK via yfinance; cannot promote GEX meta until historical OI + train+OOS pass
next_action: backtest vol_z_ge1 on larger sample; acquire historical options OI; then combine gex_sign with stock primary under walk-forward

summary: Portfolio backtest PASS_BAR: Sharpe 2.13 PF 2.68 DD -13% WR 62% on 2024-08 window; beats v14 on same window. Caveat: booster is full-sample — need WF-stitched portfolio for honest OOS.
next_action: Build v16 meta+risk; walk-forward stitch portfolio; longer 1D stress

summary: v15 meta-gate PASSES 2020-2026 1D stress (Sharpe 0.75 PF 1.70 DD -22%) where raw v13 FAILED — meta filter is the durable piece
next_action: Await v16 meta+risk; keep iterating threshold/risk on long window

summary: v15 meta gate/size + v14 Kelly/ATR overlay: PASS_BAR but does not beat v15 on Sharpe/PF/DD (Sharpe 2.06 PF 2.44 DD -10.8% vs v15 2.13/2.68/-13.2%); WINNER stays v15_meta_xgb
next_action: Keep v15 as winner; consider WF stitch or soften trail before re-stacking risk

summary: v16 PASS_BAR but does not beat v15 Sharpe/PF; DD better (-10.8%). Keep WINNER=v15; treat v16 as optional lower-DD sleeve.
next_action: Next lake: threshold sweep on long 1D window; liquid-universe OOS; do not stack more risk overlays that cut Sharpe without OOS proof
